title: Hand-Woven Jute Area Rug (4x6 ft)
shortDescription: Durable jute rug, hand-loomed in a herringbone weave.
description: A 4x6 ft rug hand-loomed from West Bengal jute in a herringbone weave. Naturally stain-resistant and breathable — good for living rooms and covered verandas. This is a test fixture for out-of-stock display and search ranking; stock is intentionally set to 0.
